waves.init_eqs_str: a['bsize'] = 0; a['bx'] = 0; a['q1'] = 0; a['by'] = 0; a['bspeed'] = 0; a['aspeed'] = 0; a['ax'] = 0; a['asize'] = 0; a['ay'] = 0; a['aturns'] = 0; a['bturns'] = 0;
waves.point_eqs_str: a['aturns']=((a['q1']*a['q1'])+a['sample']); a['asize']=0.1; a['aspeed']=0.1; a['ax']=((a['asize']-(a['asize']*a['sample']))*Math.sin((((a['aspeed']*3.14)*a['time'])+((a['sample']*6.28)*a['aturns'])))); a['ay']=((a['asize']-(a['asize']*a['sample']))*Math.cos((((a['aspeed']*3.14)*a['time'])+((a['sample']*6.28)*a['aturns'])))); a['bturns']=(a['q1']*a['q1']); a['bsize']=0.3; a['bspeed']=0.1; a['bx']=((a['bsize']-(a['bsize']*a['sample']))*Math.sin((((a['bspeed']*3.14)*a['time'])+((a['sample']*6.28)*a['bturns'])))); a['by']=((a['bsize']-(a['bsize']*a['sample']))*Math.cos((((a['bspeed']*3.14)*a['time'])+((a['sample']*6.28)*a['bturns'])))); a['x']=((-a['ax']-a['bx'])+0.5); a['y']=((a['ax']+a['by'])+0.5); a['b']=(0.9+(0.1*a['sample']));
